speaker: ANTONY
text: Nay, nay, Octavia, not only that—

speaker: ANTONY
text: That were excusable, that and thousands more

speaker: ANTONY
text: Of semblable import—but he hath waged

speaker: ANTONY
text: New wars ’gainst Pompey; made his will and read it

speaker: ANTONY
text: To public ear;

speaker: ANTONY
text: Spoke scantly of me; when perforce he could not

speaker: ANTONY
text: But pay me terms of honor, cold and sickly

speaker: ANTONY
text: He vented them, most narrow measure lent me;

speaker: ANTONY
text: When the best hint was given him, he not took ’t,

speaker: ANTONY
text: Or did it from his teeth.

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: O, my good lord,

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: Believe not all, or if you must believe,

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: Stomach not all. A more unhappy lady,

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: If this division chance, ne’er stood between,

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: Praying for both parts.

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: The good gods will mock me presently

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: When I shall pray “O, bless my lord and husband!”

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: Undo that prayer by crying out as loud

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: “O, bless my brother!” Husband win, win brother

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: Prays and destroys the prayer; no midway

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: ’Twixt these extremes at all.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Gentle Octavia,

speaker: ANTONY
text: Let your best love draw to that point which seeks

speaker: ANTONY
text: Best to preserve it. If I lose mine honor,

speaker: ANTONY
text: I lose myself; better I were not yours

speaker: ANTONY
text: Than yours so branchless. But, as you requested,

speaker: ANTONY
text: Yourself shall go between ’s. The meantime, lady,

speaker: ANTONY
text: I’ll raise the preparation of a war

speaker: ANTONY
text: Shall stain your brother. Make your soonest haste,

speaker: ANTONY
text: So your desires are yours.

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: Thanks to my lord.

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: The Jove of power make me, most weak, most weak,

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: Your reconciler. Wars ’twixt you twain would be

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: As if the world should cleave, and that slain men

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: Should solder up the rift.

speaker: ANTONY
text: When it appears to you where this begins,

speaker: ANTONY
text: Turn your displeasure that way, for our faults

speaker: ANTONY
text: Can never be so equal that your love

speaker: ANTONY
text: Can equally move with them. Provide your going;

speaker: ANTONY
text: Choose your own company, and command what cost

speaker: ANTONY
text: Your heart has mind to.
